in_reply_to_context: reply to @codex question issue comment 4949354456 on the same PR (no API in_reply_to field; issue comments are flat)
body:
**Summary**
* Added exact/suffix resolution counters to the verdict-012 sweep table so suffix-resolved cites are visible as telemetry instead of being folded into silent pass/fail totals. [sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/cite_checker_sweep.pyL293-L305](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/b0835812faf7f5a6e4b190a9cc93a11280f099a4/sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/cite_checker_sweep.py#L293-L305)
* Updated the sweep summary output to print `exact`, `suffix`, and `ambiguous` resolution counts per variant. [sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/cite_checker_sweep.pyL671-L676](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/b0835812faf7f5a6e4b190a9cc93a11280f099a4/sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/cite_checker_sweep.py#L671-L676)
* Updated the verdict recommendation to require suffix-resolved cites to still satisfy rule (b), and to treat suffix-resolved counts as the cheap audit queue for bounding the silent false-negative blind spot. [sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/REPORT.mdL196-L204](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/b0835812faf7f5a6e4b190a9cc93a11280f099a4/sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/REPORT.md#L196-L204)
* Expanded the telemetry recommendation and paste-ready verdict entry to include exact/suffix/foreign/ambiguous resolution telemetry before broad red-gate promotion. [sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/REPORT.mdL222-L229](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/b0835812faf7f5a6e4b190a9cc93a11280f099a4/sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/REPORT.md#L222-L229) [sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/REPORT.mdL243-L245](https://github.com/menno420/sim-lab/blob/b0835812faf7f5a6e4b190a9cc93a11280f099a4/sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/REPORT.md#L243-L245)

**Testing**
* ✅ `python3 -m py_compile sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/cite_checker_sweep.py`
* ✅ `python3 - <<'PY' ... run_synthetic(...) ... PY`
* ⚠️ `python3 sims/verdict-012-doc-cite-checker-spec/cite_checker_sweep.py` failed due an environment/network limitation while fetching the pinned GitHub corpus: `CONNECT tunnel failed, response 403`.

Committed changes on the current branch and created a PR titled **“Add cite resolution telemetry to verdict-012 follow-up.”**

 [View task →](https://chatgpt.com/s/cd_6a52e2af8aa0819193051543666cca43)
